• WebGL‑accelerated image‑to‑HTML text converter with live preview.
  • Configurable settings: width, font size, line spacing, character set, mapping mode, grayscale & contrast.
  • Export options for clipboard‑ready HTML and PNG download.
    gl = canvas.getContext('webgl2')
    fragColor = vec4(pixel.rgb, fontPixel.r * pixel.a)

This page lets users upload an image, choose how pixels map to characters, and instantly renders the result on a WebGL canvas. Settings trigger live updates, and finished art can be copied as HTML or saved as a PNG file. The implementation balances GPU speed with CPU‑based export for accurate color handling.
